tool.name: analyze_response
tool.description:
Comprehensive HTTP response analysis for vulnerability detection.
Analyzes response body and headers for errors, secrets, information disclosure, technology stack, and vulnerability indicators.
Use this after receiving ANY HTTP response to identify security issues.

parameter.name: response_body
parameter.description: HTTP response body content to analyze

parameter.name: request_payload
parameter.description: Original request payload to check for reflection

returns.description: Response containing: - 'findings': List of detected issues with severity - 'tech_stack': Identified technologies - 'risk_level': Overall risk assessment - 'recommendations': Remediation suggestions

tool.examples:
# Analyze response body and headers
Error: SQL syntax error near... 500
# Check for input reflection (XSS)
Welcome <script>alert(1)</script> <script>alert(1)</script>

tool.name: detect_errors
tool.description:
Detect error messages and stack traces in response content.
Identifies SQL errors (with database type), path disclosure, stack traces, debug info, and version disclosure.
Use this to find information leakage in error pages.

parameter.name: content
parameter.description: Response content to analyze for errors

returns.description: Response containing: - 'errors': List of detected errors with severity - 'has_sql_errors': Boolean if SQL errors found - 'has_stack_traces': Boolean if stack traces found

tool.examples:
# Analyze error page
Warning: mysql_query(): You have an error...

tool.name: extract_secrets
tool.description:
Extract potential secrets, API keys, and credentials.
Detects AWS keys, API tokens, database connection strings, private keys, JWTs, and other sensitive data.
CRITICAL: Secrets are redacted in output for safety.

returns.description: Response containing: - 'secrets': List of detected secrets (redacted) - 'critical_secrets': Count of critical severity secrets

tool.name: identify_tech_stack
tool.description:
Identify technology stack from response content and headers.
Detects web servers, programming languages, frameworks, CDN/WAF providers, and analyzes security headers.
Use this to map target technology for CVE correlation.

returns.description: Response containing: - 'technologies': Dict of detected technologies by category - 'missing_security_headers': List of absent security headers - 'security_score': Security header score (0-100)
